## Epic

Quality and Delivery

## Description

- Create first-run onboarding steps: wallet UI connect state, strategy overview, first deposit prompt
- Persist onboarding completion state
- Allow users to skip and revisit onboarding from settings
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Stepper with clear progress indicator and step labels
  - Each step has one primary action and one secondary action
  - Mobile layout must fit all controls without horizontal overflow

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] First-time users see onboarding
- [ ] Completion state persists correctly (local storage/state)
- [ ] Skipped onboarding can be reopened
- [ ] PR includes screenshots (all onboarding steps)

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `onboarding`, `priority-high`
